name: o9 Solutions Supply Chain Planning API
what_it_does: o9 Solutions REST API for AI-powered integrated business planning (IBP) and digital supply chain platform. Enables AI agents to manage demand forecasting and statistical model result retrieval for commercial planning, handle supply planning and production schedule data access for manufacturing operations, access inventory optimization and safety stock recommendation data, retrieve S&OP (Sales and Operations Planning) scenario and consensus data for executive alignment, manage demand sensing and short-term forecast data for operational planning, handle capacity planning and constraint management data for production optimization, access financial integration data for P&L-linked supply chain planning, retrieve new product introduction and lifecycle planning data, manage promotion and event demand signal integration, and integrate supply chain planning data with SAP S/4HANA, Oracle, and enterprise ERP systems.
use_cases: Retrieving demand forecasts from supply chain automation agents
Accessing inventory optimization recommendations from replenishment agents
Managing S&OP scenarios from executive planning agents
Integrating supply plan data with ERP from production agents
not_for: Simple inventory tracking without AI-powered planning and forecasting
Real-time execution without integrated planning and optimization focus
SMB supply chain without enterprise IBP complexity and multi-constraint planning
best_when: An enterprise using o9 Solutions wants AI agents to automate demand forecast retrieval, supply plan access, inventory optimization, S&OP scenario management, and ERP integration.
avoid_when: OPERATIONAL RISK: Supply chain planning decisions affect production, procurement, and inventory levels — automated plan execution without human review can cause overproduction, stockouts, or procurement commits. Demand forecast automation without exception management misses market signal changes. AI planning recommendations require supply chain professional review before execution.

auth.notes: o9 Solutions uses OAuth 2.0 authentication. Per-tenant and per-application API credentials. Developer portal at developer.o9solutions.com. No native webhooks — event-driven integration via ERP connectors. REST API with JSON responses. Graph-based planning data model. AI-powered planning algorithms. Integration with SAP, Oracle, and other ERPs. Strong in CPG, retail, and hi-tech verticals.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; planning modules and user count determine pricing
pricing.notes: Dallas, Texas. Founded 2009. Private ($1B+ funding, valuation $2.7B). Supply chain planning and IBP market. 100+ enterprise customers including Google, Nike, and Pfizer. o9 Digital Brain AI platform. Known for connected planning across demand, supply, and financials. Competes with Kinaxis and SAP IBP for enterprise supply chain planning.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: OPERATIONAL RISK: Supply chain planning recommendations require human review before execution; automated plan implementation without review causes procurement and production errors
Graph-based data model — o9 uses a graph-based planning data model; standard CRUD patterns don't apply; understand planning node and edge relationships before querying
ERP integration dependency — o9 planning data flows from ERP (SAP, Oracle); API access is to planning results; underlying data quality depends on ERP integration quality
Planning cycle latency — supply plans update on planning cycle (daily, weekly); real-time planning data access is limited to published plan versions
Exception management — AI planning generates exceptions for human review; build exception surfacing into planning automation rather than auto-executing all recommendations
Customer documentation — developer.o9solutions.com requires customer account; limited public API documentation available
agent_readiness.security_notes: Supply chain planning. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Supply chain planning and forecast data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Supply chain IBP. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Planning and forecast data.
